app.setup_provider_hint: Set up your AI provider in the sidebar to start asking questions.
menu.about: ZEN_RAG v4.0 — Advanced RAG Chat with Document Intelligence
footer.data_local: Your data stays on your computer
sidebar.place_gguf_hint: Place .gguf files in your models directory
sidebar.api_key_help: Get your API key from {provider} dashboard
sidebar.temperature_help: Higher = more creative, Lower = more focused
sidebar.focus_mode_help: Constrain the LLM to a specific data task. Changes the system prompt and wraps your query with task-specific directives for more precise outputs.
sidebar.prompt_templates_desc: Ready-made prompts optimised for small LLMs. Use as-is or create your own.
sidebar.template_design_rules:
**4 Rules for Small LLMs:**
1. Keep system prompt **under 200 tokens**
2. Use **imperative verbs**: Extract, List, Compare
3. Add **format constraint**: "Output as: ..."
4. Add **negative constraint**: "Do NOT ..."
sidebar.template_no_customs: No custom prompts yet. Browse the Gallery and click 📋 to clone, or click ✏️ Create.
sidebar.source_help: Choose where to get knowledge from
sidebar.supported_formats: Supported formats: txt, pdf, md, json, csv, docx
source.web_desc: Paste a URL and we'll scan all its pages for you
source.folder_desc: Point to a folder on your computer and we'll read its contents
source.telegram_desc: Scan Telegram exports or live channels
source.discord_desc: Scan Discord exports or live servers
input.web_address_help: Paste the website URL you want to RAG.
input.website_url_learn_help: Paste the website URL you want to learn about
input.max_pages_help: Safety limit — scan stops automatically when there are no more pages to follow.
input.include_images_help: Also look at images on the site
input.follow_links_same_site_help: Follow links to other pages on the same site
input.folder_path_full_help: Type or paste the full path to the folder you want to read
input.directory_path_help: Type or paste the folder path.
input.max_files_help: Limit the number of files to scan.
input.max_files_process_help: Limit how many files to process
input.subfolder_depth_help: How many levels of subfolders to look into
input.file_types_include_help: Choose which types of files to read
input.imap_server_help: Hostname or shortcut (gmail, outlook, yahoo, icloud, zoho).
input.email_password_help: Use an app-specific password for Gmail/Outlook.
input.email_folder_help: Mailbox folder to scan (INBOX, Sent, etc.)
input.email_local_path_help: Path to a folder of .eml files or a .mbox archive.
input.drag_drop_help: Drag and drop files here or click to browse
input.supported_formats_help: Supported formats: PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX, HTML, JSON
button.start_web_rag_help: Begin collecting data from the web address.
button.start_local_rag_help: Begin collecting data from the selected directory.
button.text_bundle_help: Export all documents as a single text file
status.email_coming_features: Gmail & Outlook, smart search, attachment processing.
status.api_coming_features: REST APIs, database queries, webhooks, real-time sync.
status.no_documents_yet: No documents yet. Upload some files above to get started!
status.add_docs_for_export: Add documents to enable export options.
status.data_loaded_next_step: Configure your AI model in the sidebar, then scroll down to start chatting.
status.whats_next_detail: Set up your AI provider in the sidebar, then start asking questions about your content.
status.email_integration_coming: Coming Soon — Email integration with Gmail and Outlook, smart search, and attachment processing is in development.
error.invalid_url_detail: Please enter a valid web address (e.g. example.com or https://docs.example.com).
error.scan_failed_url_hint: Check the URL and try again.
error.scan_failed_path_hint: Check the path and try again.
error.web_scan_not_installed: Web scanning is not available. Check that content_extractor is installed.
error.file_scan_not_installed: File scanning is not available. Check that content_extractor is installed.
error.invalid_path_detail: is not a valid directory. Please check and try again.
warning.folder_not_exist: This folder doesn't exist. Please check the path and try again.
warning.no_supported_files: No supported files found in this folder.
welcome.title: Chat with Your Data
welcome.subtitle: Ask questions about any website, your files, or social media
welcome.choose_source: Where would you like to start?
welcome.subtitle_line1: Ask questions about any website, your files, or emails
welcome.subtitle_line2: AI reads them so you don't have to
welcome.why_save_hours_desc: Don't read 50 pages — ask one question and get the answer instantly
welcome.why_private_desc: Everything is processed on your computer. Nothing is uploaded to the cloud
welcome.why_works_all_desc: Websites, PDFs, Word docs, text files, code, spreadsheets, and more
source_card.website_desc: Paste a URL and we'll scan all its pages for you
source_card.files_desc: Point to a folder on your computer and we'll read its contents
source_card.email_desc: Connect your inbox and search through your messages
config.collect_data_caption: Select the type of source you want to RAG. Each option has its own input, validation, and max items setting.
config.source_type_help: Choose where to collect data from.
config.web_source_caption: Enter a web address and press START. The URL will be validated automatically.
config.local_files_caption: Enter a directory path. The path will be validated automatically when you start.
config.email_coming_caption: Connect via IMAP or scan local .eml/.mbox files.
config.email_source_caption: Connect to Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo — or scan local .eml/.mbox email files.
web_scan.title: 🌐 Scan a Website
web_scan.desc: Enter a website address and we'll read all its pages. Then you can ask questions about anything on the site.
file_scan.title: 📁 Scan Your Files
file_scan.desc: Point to a folder on your computer and we'll read all the files in it. Supports PDFs, Word documents, text files, code, and more.
email_config.title: 📧 Connect Your Email
email_config.desc: Connect your Gmail or Outlook account to search and ask questions about your emails.
images.reference_caption: These images were found in your content. They're available for reference when you chat.
images.see_more: ...and {n} more. See all in the 'Your Data' tab.
data_tab.no_content: No content loaded yet. Go to the welcome screen to add a website or files.
data_tab.source_details_caption: These are the pages and files that were read. Answers will reference these sources.
docs_tab.title: Document Management
docs_tab.no_docs_yet: No documents indexed yet. Upload some files above to get started!
docs_tab.supported_formats: Supported formats: PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX, HTML, JSON
analytics_tab.title: Insights
analytics_tab.no_content: No content loaded yet. Add a website or files to see insights here.
sort.name: Name
chat.try_different_model: Try switching to a different model in the sidebar.
chat.type_question_suggestions: Type your question below, or try one of these suggestions:
chat.load_first: Load a website or folder first, then ask questions about it.
chat.audio_coming_soon: 🎙️ Audio received — voice transcription coming soon! Please type your question for now.
chat.audio_transcription_failed: 🎙️ Voice transcription failed. Please try again or type your question.
rag.ready_subtitle: We've indexed your content. You can now ask questions about it below.
suggestion.important_details: What are the most important details?
model_status.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — is the model running?
input.social_platform_help: Choose which social media platform to scan.
input.social_mode_help: Export File: upload an exported chat file. Live API: connect with credentials.
input.dedup_mode_help: After: batch review after scanning. Live: pause and ask during ingestion.
social.whatsapp_export_help: Use WhatsApp → Chat → Export Chat to get a .txt file.
social.whatsapp_file_help: Upload the .txt file exported from WhatsApp.
social.whatsapp_use_export: WhatsApp doesn't offer a public API. Please export your chat as a .txt file instead.
social.telegram_export_help: Use Telegram Desktop → Export Chat History → JSON format.
social.telegram_file_help: Upload the result.json file exported from Telegram Desktop.
social.telegram_live_help: Connect via Telethon API. Get credentials at https://my.telegram.org
social.discord_export_help: Use DiscordChatExporter to export a channel as JSON.
social.discord_file_help: Upload the JSON file exported from DiscordChatExporter.
social.discord_live_help: Connect via Discord bot. Create one at https://discord.com/developers
social.discord_token_help: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal
social.discord_channel_help: Numeric channel ID (right-click channel → Copy ID)
error.social_scanner_unavailable: Social scanner module not available. Check that social_scanner.py exists.
marketplace.title: Model Marketplace
marketplace.hw_filter_help: Only show models your machine can run smoothly
marketplace.no_models_match: No models match your filters. Try disabling the hardware filter.
marketplace.trending_desc: Hottest GGUF models on HuggingFace right now
marketplace.no_trending: Cannot fetch trending models. Check internet connection.
marketplace.no_results: No GGUF models found. Try a different query.
marketplace.search_hint: Type a query to search HuggingFace for GGUF models
marketplace.no_local_models: No .gguf models found on this machine.
marketplace.no_local_hint: Download models from Staff Picks or Search, or place .gguf files in C:\AI\Models or ~/AI/Models
marketplace.tier_high_desc: 🟢 Your GPU can fully offload 7B-14B+ models. All Staff Picks will run great!
marketplace.tier_medium_desc: 🟡 Your CPU + RAM can handle 7B-13B models. Most Staff Picks work well.
marketplace.tier_low_desc: 🟠 Stick to small quants (Q4 or lower) and ≤7B models. Llama 3.2 3B and Phi-3 Mini are perfect for you.
marketplace.tier_minimal_desc: 🔴 Your system is limited. Try TinyLlama or Phi-3 Mini with Q2-Q4 quantization.
